text: I feel a sense of anticipation and contemplation. The glass walls and clean lines of the meeting room evoke an analytical calm, while the R+D exhibition on the wall next door pulls me toward curiosity and forward-thinking. There is a vibe of innovation here, yet also a touch of distance—like standing at the edge of new ideas, momentarily pausing before I leap in. I sense a gentle unease stirred with optimism, as if uncertainty and hope are intertwined in the act of research and design.
